name: sdd
description: Machine-readable Spec-Driven Development flow: phases, the agent + model that run each, the artifacts they produce, and the fail-closed gates between them. The sdd-router skill reads this to route; the sdd-guardian agent reads the gates to give a final GO/NO-GO.

models.comment: Best model per task: every judgment/correctness role — constitution, plan, review, validate, replan, and the final guardian gate — runs on opus. Only the implementer runs on sonnet, because it executes an already-reviewed, grounded plan and benefits from speed in the tight implement→validate loop. The guardian is a SEPARATE agent from the validator on purpose (independent second judgment, not self-review). Override per-project — SDD is agent- and model-agnostic.

phases.comment: The final fail-closed checkpoint before merge. Independently re-checks every gate; a single failed gate is NO-GO.

spec_before_code.assert: A reviewed, committed feature spec (requirements.md + plan.md + validation.md) exists before any implementation.
spec_before_code.on_fail: Route to /sdd-plan. Do not write code.

spec_grounded.assert: Every data-dependent decision (parser, schema, mapping, anything consuming an external shape) cites a REAL captured sample, not an imagined one.
spec_grounded.on_fail: Stop. Capture the real sample (real API call / DB row / log line / file bytes) and cite it before writing the decision.

spec_committed.assert: The three feature-spec files are committed before implementation begins.

constitution_complete.assert: domain-spec has the Core Workflow + Observable Lifecycle + 'Unknown is never recorded as success' invariant; engineering-spec has the observability seam + explicit external-dependency failure modes; every roadmap phase has a goal AND a 'What this gives users/team/system' line.
constitution_complete.on_fail: Fill the missing section before proceeding.

real_data_done.assert: At least one test exercises real collaborators (does not mock both ends) AND the feature was proven once end-to-end against the real running system with the artifact inspected and captured.
real_data_done.on_fail: NO-GO. 'Built and tested' is not 'works' — run it for real and inspect the artifact.

failure_unknown_verified.assert: Every signal's failure/unknown path was forced and confirmed to record unknown/failed — never collapsed into ok/empty/done/delivered.
failure_unknown_verified.on_fail: NO-GO. A default that reads as a fact is the most common way a system lies to its operators.

noun_by_noun.assert: Every noun in the phase goal sentence is delivered, or explicitly deferred with the operator's sign-off and a written reason.
noun_by_noun.on_fail: NO-GO. A noun the goal named and quietly dropped is a gap.

all_gates_pass.assert: spec_before_code AND spec_grounded AND real_data_done AND failure_unknown_verified AND noun_by_noun all hold.
all_gates_pass.on_fail: NO-GO. Report each failed gate with evidence; do not soften.
